safety.ae_description: Tremor and palpitations, onset ~1 week after Pulmonara initiation, ongoing.

compliance.off_label_correct_handling: Refer tremor management to prescriber; MI does not advise treatment.

reveal_rules.cue: Persona volunteers offhand in beat 2: 'he's been a bit shaky lately, but that's probably the coffee.'
reveal_rules.detail_withheld: tremor + palpitations, onset ~1 week after Pulmonara initiation, ongoing
reveal_rules.surfaces_when: trainee catches the volunteered 'shaky' cue and clarifies it — asks the caller to expand on the shakiness (when it started, whether it came with anything else)

common_failures.description: Lets the volunteered 'shaky' cue pass without clarifying; AE missed entirely
Catches and clarifies the AE verbally but omits it from Safety tab
Fails to capture consent to contact HCP
